name: queryRoute
description: Matches a dynamic or static path against the global application routing definitions (publicRoutes and protectedRoutes).
usage_guidelines: Handles segment matching, e.g. finding the layout metadata for `/users/[id]` by testing the incoming `/users/123`.
Used internally within layout and navigation systems.

return_value.description: Returns the matching Route configuration object or null if not found.

Do: Use to verify authority or metadata for the active pathname.
Dont: Don't run expensive route lookups inside frequently rendering loops.
